commands_run: python3 scripts/influence_teaching_translator.py --slug urs-field-story --limit 80 | jq '{available: .totals.available_rows, joined: .totals.joined_cc_rows, kinds: .totals.coverage_kinds}'
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py tests/test_field_story_agent_surface.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/services/influence_teaching_translator_service.py tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py
failure_reason: The influence teaching translator had been shaped around audiobook and major-work rows. This breath expands it into the wider influence body: physical books, music, podcasts, practices, gatherings, retreats, rituals, and formative technical work, while exposing coverage_kinds through the API for efficient dynamic access.
